description: Wave 1 - M09 AWS Cloud: Implement cloud backend Lambda handlers, CDK infrastructure definitions, DynamoDB schemas, and IoT topic contracts. Branch: feat/m09-aws-cloud
steps: Create branch feat/m09-aws-cloud from main
Create services/cloud-backend/package.json with TypeScript, AWS SDK v3 types (structure only, no install)
Create services/cloud-backend/tsconfig.json
Create services/cloud-backend/src/handlers/ingest.ts implementing ingest-handler: schema validation, identity verification, idempotent event put, gateway health update, notification evaluation
Create services/cloud-backend/src/handlers/admin-api.ts implementing admin-api-handler: site/gateway status, event list/detail, ACK/resolve/classify, presigned URL
Create services/cloud-backend/src/domain/event.ts with TypeScript types matching contracts/events/ schemas
Create services/cloud-backend/src/domain/gateway.ts with Gateway inventory types
Create services/cloud-backend/src/domain/validation.ts with schema validation logic
Create services/cloud-backend/src/domain/validation.test.ts with unit tests for validation
Create infra/aws/bin/app.ts CDK app entry point
Create infra/aws/lib/foundation-stack.ts with base resources
Create infra/aws/lib/iot-stack.ts with IoT Core Thing, Certificate, Policy, Rules
Create infra/aws/lib/data-stack.ts with DynamoDB tables (Gateways, Events) and S3 bucket
Create infra/aws/lib/api-stack.ts with API Gateway HTTP API and Cognito
Create infra/aws/lib/web-stack.ts with CloudFront and S3 frontend hosting
Create infra/aws/package.json and tsconfig.json
Create contracts/mqtt/topics.md documenting MQTT topic structure: safegai/v1/{tenant}/{site}/{gateway}/{type}
Ensure NO machine control endpoint, topic, or shadow field exists
Ensure cloud-to-device settings are non-safety allowlist only
Ensure Gateway identity is validated per certificate/topic scope
Run python3 scripts/check-json.py to validate all JSON files
Commit all changes
acceptance_criteria: Ingest handler validates schema, identity, and idempotency
Admin API handler provides read operations and ACK/resolve only
No machine control API endpoint exists
No cloud-to-device safety command topic exists
DynamoDB schema matches docs/AWS_MVP_SPEC.md (Gateways PK=tenantId SK=siteId#gatewayId, Events PK=tenantId#siteId SK=detectedAt#eventId)
CDK stacks follow the layout in docs/AWS_MVP_SPEC.md
